note: verifier verdict was 'warn' due to an audit-integrity defect (note.export logged 'ok' before htmlToPdf); FIXED in this sprint (audit moved to after successful generation) — re-verified. Timeout concern also addressed (explicit 20s bound on launch/setContent).
resolved: AUDIT DEFECT (was warn): note.export audit written before htmlToPdf → fixed, now written only after artifact succeeds (notes.ts).
TIMEOUT CONCERN: PDF render had only playwright defaults → added explicit 20s timeout on launch + setContent (export.ts).
